title: Embeddium Unofficial Japanese Translate (EUJT)
body:
# **WARNING:I am currently logged into CurseForge, and I can no longer access Discord, so I am taking care of it here. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.**

Unofficial translation of [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium).

# Description
**---English---**
Embeddium was translated into Japanese.
It was Japanese who created it.
This resource pack is unofficial.

**---日本語---**

Embeddiumを日本語に翻訳しました。
これを作ったのは日本人です。
このリソースパックは非公式です。

# Links

[[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ejut)] [[GitHub](https://github.com/penguin06329a/Embeddium-Unofficial-Japanese-Translate)] [[X](https://x.com/penguin06329a)]

If you are seeking a translation of Sodium, use [Translations for Sodium](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium).
However, EUJT also includes a translation for Sodium.

# Translation of game screens
Video Settings(ビデオ設定)
![Options Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f09fb6259fd3bd1732a2761e257e5a80ee73a6f3.png)
Embeddium and Iris Mod Menu Translation(EmbeddiumとIrisのMod Menuの翻訳)
![Mod Menu Translation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf4db8cff7b7bdf4f7c8c442aebaaca9ac022266.png)
